summary: Repair the page overlay and add persistent gesture sensitivity controls.
scope: Invert the real webpage backdrop under the pinch cursor.
Restore the page receiver when the native controller closes.
Persist swipe and pinch sensitivity sliders locally.
validation: Static controller layout inspection at 300x350 and 300x540
notes: The storage permission contains only two numeric sensitivity preferences.
Real camera behavior after closing the native controller still requires Chrome verification.
